title: RLHF & RLAIF deep dive
focus: Reward modeling pipeline; Constitutional AI; reward hacking detection.

items.label: Design Add And Search Words Data Structure
RLHF pipeline: SFT → RM → PPO
interviewQuestions: Walk through the three stages of RLHF end-to-end.
What goes wrong if your reward model is poorly calibrated?
Why does PPO-based RLHF commonly add a per-token KL penalty against a reference model?
What metrics would you log during RLHF training to catch reward hacking, KL explosion, value collapse, or throughput bottlenecks?

items.label: RLAIF, Constitutional AI, RLEF
interviewQuestions: What is Constitutional AI, and how does it reduce reliance on human labels?
Where does RLAIF struggle — what kinds of judgments still need humans?

items.label: Reward hacking & alignment evals
interviewQuestions: Walk through how reward hacking shows up in practice and how you'd detect it.
How would you design an eval suite that catches sycophancy and excessive hedging in an RLHF'd model?
What reward-hacking behaviors appear when a grader overweights formatting, latex boxes, verbosity, or rubric-like tables?
Why can process reward models help reasoning tasks, and how can they introduce new reward-hacking paths?
